problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
hypothesis: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Enzymatic. Enzymatic depolymerization of specific polymer directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Life cycle assessment with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
